Package javadraw.internal

Interface LocatableInterface

All Superinterfaces:
DrawableInterface
All Known Subinterfaces:
Drawable2DInterface, Resizable2DInterface
All Known Implementing Classes:
FilledArc, FilledOval, FilledPolygon, FilledRect, FilledRoundedRect, FramedArc, FramedOval, FramedPolygon, FramedRect, FramedRoundedRect, ObjectDrawPolygon, ObjectDrawRectangularShape, Text, Triangle, Turtle, VisibleImage
public interface LocatableInterface extends DrawableInterface
